_comment: Yatori Android remote policy. JSON does not support // comments, so these _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the app.
_comment_enabled: Set enabled to false to remotely disable the app for all users who can fetch this policy.
_comment_minSupportedVersion: Versions lower than minSupportedVersion are blocked and must update before continuing.
_comment_latestVersion: latestVersion is used for soft or forced update prompts. Keep it in sync with GitHub Releases.
_comment_forceUpdate: When true and latestVersion is newer than the installed version, the app shows a non-dismissible update blocker.
_comment_softUpdate: When true and latestVersion is newer, the app shows a normal update reminder that users can dismiss.
message: 发现新版本，请更新后继续使用。
_comment_disabledMessage: Message shown when enabled is false.
disabledMessage: 当前版本已停用，请前往 GitHub 下载最新版。
_comment_downloadUrl: The button in update/disabled screens opens this URL.
_comment_updatedAt: Human-readable policy update time. This is displayed in the forced update/disabled dialog.
